data.title: Benjamin Netanyahu, Donald Trump speak on Iran updates, China visit | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: "For Iran, the Clock is ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won’t be anything left of them. TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE," Trump wrote on Truth Social.
data.keywords: Benjamin Netanyahu,China,Donald Trump,Xi Jinping,strait of hormuz,Operation Epic Fury,Operation Roaring Lion
